name: R.M.
imaging: Plain film right foot: periosteal reaction at 5th metatarsal, concerning for osteomyelitis. MRI pending.
presentation: 2 days of worsening right foot pain, redness, and drainage from a chronic plantar wound. Exam: 2 cm plantar wound with purulent drainage, 6 cm surrounding erythema, bony structures visible at wound base.
